title: veronica austriaca subsp. gundisalvii
intro: Veronica austriaca subsp. gundisalvii, also known as Austrian speedwell, is a perennial plant species within the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Veronica austriaca subsp. gundisalvii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used topically as a poultice or salve to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
